case_title: PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC VS. TRUNG Q NGUYEN et al

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT NGUYEN, TRUNG Q DOES 1 TO 25 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-09-2012
DECLARATION RE: VENUE PER CCP 395(B) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT NGUYEN, TRUNG Q
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC SERVED MAY-08-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT NGUYEN, TRUNG Q
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $147.52 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT NGUYEN, TRUNG Q
DECLARATION JOHNNY TABOR FILED RE: REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT JUDGMENT (CCP 585); COPIES IN LIEU OF ORIGINALS (EVID 1550); AND INTEREST FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC
DECLARATION RE: REDUCED FILING FEES FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC
DECLARATION EMILY PIERCE FILED RE: COMPLIANCE WITH CCP SECTION 1033(B)(2) WAIVER OF ATTORNEY FEES FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NGUYEN, TRUNG Q $1,161.18 PRINCIPAL, $147.52 INTEREST, $236.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,544.70, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 25
